summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong recent focus on AWS data platforms, Python, SQL, PySpark, ETL/ELT, and production analytics pipelines. Built and operated large-scale telemetry and capacity data pipelines using Python/Pandas, PySpark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Parquet, and cloud-oriented data lake patterns. Strong background in data quality, performance tuning, production troubleshooting, documentation, and regulated enterprise delivery; actively building Terraform/IaC fluency while bringing deep AWS and data engineering foundations.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual data preparation with repeatable, monitored data workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue-based ETL, and Redshift-oriented analytics workloads to support scalable capacity forecasting and executive reporting.
Developed PySpark and distributed-processing workflows for large telemetry datasets, improving throughput for forecasting, reporting, and historical analysis use cases.
Designed optimized data models and retention structures for historical telemetry, improving query performance, traceability, and downstream analytics reliability.
Applied data quality checks, reconciliation logic, and operational validation to production reporting pipelines used by capacity, infrastructure, and leadership stakeholders.
Monitored, troubleshot, and tuned production data workflows, addressing data integrity issues, runtime failures, and performance bottlenecks across enterprise-scale datasets.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data flows for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, turning performance telemetry into actionable engineering recommendations.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic monitoring data to identify performance opportunities adopted by application teams.
Supported AWS migration planning and monitoring readiness by evaluating telemetry, operational requirements, and production performance signals.
Maintained high-quality technical documentation for monitoring processes, platform changes, and production cutover activities.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as enterprise APM SME across 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting large-scale monitoring data, dashboards, alerts, and operational reporting.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual weekly exports.
Designed reusable monitoring modules, dashboards, thresholds, and technical documentation adopted across client environments.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic and infrastructure teams to diagnose bottlenecks using telemetry-driven root cause analysis.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Automated schema conversion and validation pipelines to preserve data integrity throughout phased migration cutover.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing and database access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95%.
Built test and validation frameworks to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON
skills.AWS Data Platform: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Athena concepts, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data lakes, data warehousing, data modeling, data quality, reconciliation, production troubleshooting, pipeline monitoring
skills.Big Data & File Formats: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Apache Parquet, JSON, CSV, Avro concepts, distributed processing
skills.Performance & Reliability: SQL optimization, partitioning concepts, compression, cost-aware query design, performance tuning, failure analysis, runbooks
skills.Delivery & DevOps: Docker, Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, technical documentation, Terraform/IaC concepts

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark concepts for scalable ETL, query-ready storage, and cost-aware analytics.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics pipeline for enterprise telemetry, using data quality checks and scalable processing to support capacity risk analysis and reporting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted automation pipeline with structured JSON artifacts, semantic duplicate detection, quality gates, and reproducible workflow steps.
